---
title: "`r params$report_title`"
author: "`r params$report_author`"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    code_folding: hide
params:
  # Master Data Path
  data_path: !r here::here("1_data", "babychecker.csv")

  # Variables
  status_var: "Scan Result Type"

  # Optional: fixed category order as comma-separated values (e.g. "Green,Yellow,Red").
  # Leave "" to order by frequency (largest first).
  category_order: "Green,Yellow,Red"

  # Policy-Facing Labels
  metric_name: "BabyChecker Triage Results"

  # --- Report Text (all editable; leave "" to use the smart default) ---
  report_title: "Composition Overview: Waffle Chart"
  report_author: "Ibraheem Saqib Ellahi"
  chart_title: ""
  chart_subtitle: ""
  source_note: "Generated via CERP Analytics Template"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  dev.args = list(bg = "#FAF9F6"),
  fig.path = paste0(here::here("4_output", "figures"), "/"),
  fig.width = 7,
  fig.height = 5.5,
  fig.retina = 3
)
```

```{r cerp-style, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat("<style>", readr::read_file(here::here("2_R", "cerp_style.css")), "</style>")
```

```{r load-and-prep}
library(tidyverse)
source(here::here("2_R", "2.5_helpers.R"), local = TRUE)

# Load data (headers and values whitespace-scrubbed) and validate YAML params.
# All category counting, rounding, coloring + plotting now lives in viz_waffle()
# (2_R/2.6_viz_functions.R).
raw_data <- cerp_load(params$data_path)
cerp_validate(raw_data, params[grepl("_var$", names(params))])
```


```{r plot-waffle}
source(here::here("2_R", "2.0_setup_theme.R"), local = TRUE)
source(here::here("2_R", "2.6_viz_functions.R"), local = TRUE)

viz_waffle(
  data           = raw_data,
  status_var     = params$status_var,
  category_order = params$category_order,
  metric_name    = params$metric_name,
  chart_title    = params$chart_title,
  chart_subtitle = params$chart_subtitle,
  source_note    = params$source_note
)
```
